title: Replace !important with Better Specificity
description: Remove !important usage by using better selector specificity.
hint: Increase selector specificity by adding a class or using cascade order.
solution: Change .btn { color: red !important; } to .btn-primary { color: red; } or ensure the rule comes after conflicting rules.

title: Convert px to rem
description: Given a stylesheet using px units, convert to rem for accessibility.
hint: Divide px by 16 (default browser font size) to get rem values.
starterCode:
h1 { font-size: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
p { font-size: 14px; line-height: 24px; }

title: Refactor with Custom Properties
description: Refactor a stylesheet with repeated colors and values to use CSS custom properties.
hint: Extract repeated colors, font sizes, and spacing values into :root variables.
solution: :root { --primary: #0055CC; --spacing: 1rem; --radius: 8px; } Then replace values with var() calls.
starterCode:
.btn { background: #0055CC; color: white; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; }
.card { border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; border: 1px solid #0055CC; }

title: Add Defensive CSS
description: Add defensive CSS techniques to handle content overflow and image scaling.
hint: Add overflow-wrap, max-width: 100% on images, text-overflow: ellipsis on long text.
solution: img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; } .long-text { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .break-word { overflow-wrap: break-word; }

title: Restructure CSS Architecture
description: Reorganize a messy stylesheet into a logical structure with proper cascade layers.
hint: Use @layer to create explicit cascade layers: reset, base, components, utilities.
solution: @layer reset, base, components, utilities; @layer reset { /* reset */ } @layer base { /* typography */ } @layer components { /* card, btn */ } @layer utilities { /* .text-center */ }
